productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Running White Sports Shoes
description: Offering lightweight comfort and packed with features, the adidas Blazer makes for a fabulous running shoe, offering breathable comfort and barasion resistance mile after mile. For those who love to flaunt a sporty style, this shoe also makes for a great casual wear.UpperHeavily meshed upper for enhanced breathablity and lightweight comfortSynthetic leather overlays with adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides for enhanced shoe structureMeshed and padded tongue and collar for breathable comfortCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded sockliner for all-day comfort and shock absorptionMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole for enhanced durability Waffle pattern lugs for absolute grip and tractionFlex grooves in the forefoot for ease of movement Impact guidance system for better shock distribution and energy returnScooped heel for enhanced cushioned comfort to the backfoot and anklesShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
